assertions.title: Rotate button on profile row navigates to Rotate Keyset

steps.action: Prepare returning-user list in clean isolated session with at least two saved profiles
steps.expected: Welcome returning list variant renders rows with explicit Rotate buttons
steps.observed: Returning list rendered with two rows: 'Rotate Retest Beta ...' and 'Rotate Retest Alpha ...', each with Unlock and Rotate buttons

steps.action: From Welcome returning list, click Rotate on the specific 'Rotate Retest Alpha' row (not row body/unlock)
Verify selected row keyset preloads on Rotate Keyset form
steps.expected: Rotate form preloaded keyset name matches selected row keyset ('Rotate Retest Alpha')
steps.observed: Rotate form Source Share #1 card showed 'Saved Profile My Signing Key', not the selected row keyset 'Rotate Retest Alpha'

evidence.consoleErrors: none after clearing error log before the assertion run
evidence.network: No requests captured (client-side SPA route transition)

assertions.issues: Preloaded keyset/profile name on Rotate Keyset form does not correspond to the selected Welcome row; appears hardcoded/stale as 'My Signing Key'.

frictions.description: To create setup profiles in headless mode, Distribution Completion's Finish button remained disabled until each remote share QR modal was opened/dismissed.
frictions.resolution: Opened both QR modals and clicked Done for each profile setup run.

summary: Retested 1 assertion (VAL-WELCOME-010): navigation via row Rotate button passed, but selected-row keyset preload failed (form showed 'My Signing Key' instead of selected row keyset).
